data.name: Shards of Her
data.detailed_description:
Step into a world full of magic and where once the gods reigned supreme, but now hunted and on the brink of oblivion.

A vanished love. A forgotten war. A destiny he never knew.

Michael's world is turned upside down when a fallen goddess returns, forcing him to confront his own mysterious origins and a looming battle between gods and mortals.

His search for answers will reveal a truth more dangerous than he could ever imagine.

  • Deep, Branching Narrative - Immerse yourself in a multi-Act story with over 58k words (and growing...), where your choices shape relationships and the fate of reality.

  • Stunning Visuals - Explore a world brought to life by high quality renders and detailed character designs.

  • Engaging Voice Over - Experience key narrative moments enhanced by compelling voice narration.

  • Extensive Codex & Lore Entries - Uncover detailed character biographies, shard descriptions, realm histories, location details, and a comprehensive timeline within the in-game CODEX.

  • Mature Themes - Explores complex topics including grief, desire, sacrifice, and existential threats.

Experience the world of Shards of Her through Michael's eyes, confront fragmented memories of your lost divine love while piecing together conflicting truths about the Primordial Dawn from powerful, biased sources.

Forge bonds with complex allies, but beware manipulation by ancient forces. Navigate temptations of the flesh and soul that test your resolve, make sacrifices with unforeseen costs, and wield power you barely comprehend.

It's up to you how you walk this path of remembrance and reckoning, but remember: every choice resonates, shaping not only your destiny but the fate of reality itself.

"They survived one Dawn, hoping for peace... They should have prayed the dawn never came again." - Aethra


  • CHARACTERS - Explore the lives and legends of those who shape the destiny of this world. Uncover their pasts, their powers, and explore their evolving forms.

  • REALMS - Explore the realms touched by both divine grace and primordial darkness. Uncover their forgotten lore, and prepare to walk their paths once more.

  • THE SHARDS - Delve into the mysteries of the Seven Shards, remnants of a shattered goddess. Learn their histories, their powers, and the sins they embody.

  • ASTROLOGY - Decipher the language of the stars. Explore the months and signs that guide the fate of this world, and discover the hidden connections between the heavens and the earth.

  • TIMELINE - From the whispers of creation to the clash of destinies, witness the turning points that defined a universe. Uncover the truth behind the legends, one event at a time.

  • THE ORCHESTRA - Relive the moments. Access and listen to the game's full musical score and memorable tracks here.

  • SHADOW REALM - Enter the gallery to view your favorite characters up close! Explore different outfits, dynamic poses, or alternate appearances.

  • SPECIALS - Fun extras and bonus content! Check back here for special holiday-themed scenes, 'what-if' scenarios, or other non-canon side stories added in future updates.

"When the Tempest's fragments sing, and the Reaper begins its harvest... what hope remains? May the gods of creation have mercy, for their world teeters on oblivion." - Melitha

data.short_description: Embark in a world of magic, where once mighty gods reigned supreme, but now are hunted and on the brink of oblivion. Can you save your love amidst a world consumed by lust and betrayal?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 and Higher
  • 處理器: Intel/AMD 2.0GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible DirectX 9.0c / OpenGL
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Being in EARLY Access game might require more disk space as the updates are released.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon/Intel 1.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated GPU Card
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Being in EARLY Access game might require more disk space as the updates are released.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Being in EARLY Access game might require more disk space as the updates are released.
